creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to hlh from comment #26)
I don't understand why your 'pfctl -si' would then only show 31 states.

Either way, it would be interesting to run the dtrace script constantly (saving the output), and see what's in that log when the problem occurs.
I'd expect it to stop showing updates when you end up in this state, and restart when you trigger the workaround. The interesting bit would be the last line(s) before it blocks, and the first line(s) when it resumes.
